[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010000100 2
1 0000000001 1
2 0100000100 2
3 0000000000 a
4 0000000000 a
5 0000000000 a
6 0010000000 1
7 0001000010 2
